recentTweets.text: The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act is a big deal for Nevadans. This bill is going to build more homes and lower costs in our state, and I was proud to fight to get it passed. https://t.co/YF2IKh6yn0

In this video, Donald Trump’s nominee for Attorney General just committed to going after access to mifepristone – the abortion pill – including in states like Nevada where we have voted to protect abortion rights.

That’s what at stake here.

Listen to what Trump is saying about mail-in voting and then think about this: he voted in the last election by mail.

Mail voting is safe and secure, even Donald Trump knows. He’s lying about this so he can take control of our elections and avoid accountability for his failures

Donald Trump spread baseless conspiracies tonight that have been either repeatedly debunked or proven by his own administration not to have impacted any election results. Why? To distract from his failed presidency and broken promises. It won’t work. 

Costs are soaring, Trump is

Veterans ought to be able to count on the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau to stand up for them when big corporations are taking advantage of them. Under Russ Vought’s “leadership,” the CFPB is being dismantled and the cops are being taken off the beat.
 
I pushed him today https://t.co/jduqKyW7fg

Like you, I've seen the video of the deeply disturbing, and frankly confusing, incident at Harry Reid airport. The ICE agents' conduct is completely unprofessional and unacceptable for any law enforcement officer, and I have demanded immediate answers.

Russ Vought delayed anti-drug trafficking funding for so long that law enforcement had to cut back their programs and staff.

The Trump Admin. broke the law and put Americans in harm's way over ridiculous "wokeism" nonsense - and they refuse to take accountability for any of it. https://t.co/6ZF4WmQg7y

What about the nearly half of Americans who don’t have a 401k or own stocks?

What about struggling workers in my state that are being hit hard by Trump’s inflation, many of whom don’t

https://t.co/v23HggnbEs
